ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: al Serenissimo re della virtude [Claudio Tolomei, with a letter from the printer to the reader written by A. F. Doni?]
ItacWorkItem.Notes: According to Denis Rhodes, the printer is Gabriele Giolito de` Ferrari, and the place of publication is Venice (see Rhodes, `Accertamenti`, in Bullettino storico piacentino, 80, 1985).
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
